vocab.meaning: có cùng sự thấu hiểu và yêu thích cái gì
vocab.example: My father and I have a shared affinity for vintage cinematography, often spending hours discussing classic films.

vocab.meaning: có phong cách riêng biệt, độc đáo (thường là cá nhân)
vocab.example: While my parents enjoy mainstream sports, I have more idiosyncratic hobbies like taxidermy and urban exploration.

vocab.meaning: thừa hưởng niềm đam mê đối với...
vocab.example: I seem to have inherited a passion for culinary arts from my mother, who is a phenomenal baker.

vocab.meaning: hoàn toàn khác biệt, không có điểm chung
vocab.example: In terms of creative interests, my brother and I are worlds apart; he is very technical while I am more artistic.
Playing chess has become an intergenerational hobby in my house, passed down from my grandfather to me.

vocab.meaning: cùng ghét/không thích cái gì đó
vocab.example: One thing my family has in common is a mutual distaste for high-impact exercise; we much prefer sedentary activities.

vocab.meaning: giống (về tính cách, sở thích) một người thân
vocab.example: I definitely take after my aunt when it comes to my obsession with collecting rare stamps.

vocab.meaning: lấp đầy khoảng cách (giúp các thành viên gần nhau hơn)
vocab.example: Although our daily routines differ, weekend hiking trips help bridge the gap between our varying interests.

vocab.meaning: theo đuổi sự quan tâm/sở thích về...
vocab.example: I chose to pursue an interest in robotics, which was quite a departure from my family's background in law.

vocab.meaning: gắn kết cả gia đình/nhà lại với nhau
vocab.example: Football is the only hobby that truly unifies the household, especially during the World Cup.
